appName.message: newtab01: Halaman tab baru berbasis bookmark
appName.description: Extension display name shown in the Chrome toolbar, chrome://extensions, and the Chrome Web Store listing.

appDescription.message: Halaman tab baru berbasis bookmark. Buka folder sebagai grup tab atau dalam tampilan terpisah. 12 tema + tema kustom dari tweakcn.
appDescription.description: Short summary shown in the Chrome Web Store listing and chrome://extensions. Must stay under Chrome's 132-character manifest description limit.
